🎓 Academic Background

BSc Software Engineering · Sir Syed University · CGPA 3.43
Oct 2021 – Sep 2025

I am a Software Engineering graduate and a practicing Transformation & Data Analyst at UBL's International Operations (IO Athena programme), where I work across UAE, Qatar, and Bahrain operations from the Karachi head office.

My professional profile sits at the intersection of data analytics, process transformation, quality assurance, and banking technology. I specialize in converting complex operational data into actionable intelligence that drives measurable improvements in efficiency, compliance, and service delivery.

I bring hands-on experience in building MIS dashboards, automating reporting workflows, performing system QA, and aligning cross-functional teams around data governance and SWIFT standards. I hold multiple professional certifications from Google, Anthropic, and Uniathena spanning data analytics, project management, UX, and AI.

University Expertise

Throughout my undergraduate studies at Sir Syed University of Engineering & Technology, I developed strong expertise across the full software engineering spectrum. I am well-versed in software quality assurance methodologies — including manual testing, automation frameworks (Selenium, JUnit), test case design, and TDD — achieving 98/100 in my Software Quality Engineering module. My academic foundation covers software architecture, UML-based design, SDLC lifecycle management, requirement engineering, and business process modelling. Additionally, I built analytical depth through coursework in Big Data Analytics, Data Warehousing, data mining techniques (classification, clustering, OLAP), and applied data visualization — all of which I actively leverage in my professional role today.

Career History
Professional Experience
Transformation & Data Analyst
UBL — International Operations (IO Athena) · Karachi, Pakistan
2025 – Present · Permanent
Lead end-to-end data analysis and performance reporting for international remittance, trade, and cross-border transaction operations across UAE, Qatar, and Bahrain regions, delivering executive dashboards that enable strategic oversight and SLA compliance tracking.
Drive process transformation initiatives by identifying workflow bottlenecks, automating manual reporting cycles, and designing structured MIS frameworks — resulting in measurable improvements in turnaround time and operational accuracy.
Collaborate with IT, Compliance, and International Operations teams to align data architecture with SWIFT messaging standards, regulatory requirements, and internal audit controls — ensuring data integrity and audit readiness across all reporting layers.
Perform QA of core banking systems and transformation deliverables, including UAT support, process validation, and exception handling — maintaining quality benchmarks across the Athena programme's five operational units.
Design and maintain reconciliation reports, BRD/CRF documentation, and project pipeline trackers for 10 live technology initiatives, supporting the Head of Athena with data-driven decision intelligence.
Software Quality Engineer
Lennar Digital · Remote (Part-Time)
2024 – 2025 · 1 Year
Designed and executed comprehensive manual test cases covering functional, regression, and usability scenarios for enterprise-grade digital products.
Documented and tracked software defects using structured bug reporting methodologies, collaborating directly with development teams to ensure timely resolution and regression sign-off.
Validated application performance, user-facing functionality, and integration touchpoints against defined acceptance criteria — consistently maintaining product quality standards across release cycles.
Deep Learning Lab Associate & Instructor
Sir Syed University of Engineering & Technology — CS Department · Karachi
2024 – 2025 · Part-Time
Delivered applied deep learning lab sessions to undergraduate students, covering neural network architectures, model training pipelines, and computer vision techniques using Python-based AI frameworks (TensorFlow / PyTorch).
Guided students through hands-on implementation of real-world AI projects including object detection, image classification, and data preprocessing — directly supporting the academic development of multiple student cohorts.
Developed structured lab exercise materials, project guidelines, and assessment rubrics aligned with the university curriculum — fostering an outcome-driven and technically rigorous learning environment.
Mentored Final Year Project teams on deep learning and computer vision applications, contributing to multiple successful project deliveries and competition entries.
Excelerate · Global Experiential Programme
2 Months · Internship
Developed a full project charter, schedule, and risk register for a globally coordinated experiential event — managing scope, timelines, and cross-border team collaboration.
Designed and administered the event budget, identified risk mitigation strategies, and presented project outcomes to senior leadership.
Completed a 360-degree performance evaluation with distinction, recognized for initiative, communication, and delivery quality.

Notable Work
Projects & Initiatives
Banking · Real-Time · In Progress
CBS Payment Monitoring Dashboard — CPU Remittance
Developing a centralized real-time payment monitoring dashboard in collaboration with DPG, Digital Banking, and IT teams at UBL International Operations. The system provides RMs (Relationship Managers), Unit Heads, and back-office CPU Remittance staff with live visibility into both outward and inward remittance transactions — from branch initiation all the way through to SWIFT authorization. Key functionalities include real-time transaction status tracking, assignment of payments to processors by Unit Heads, authorization workflows, multi-role access (RM · Branch · Unit Head), and centralized exception flagging — eliminating fragmented manual monitoring and streamlining the full payment lifecycle in one unified interface.
UBL Internal Initiative · IO Athena
AI / Computer Vision
YOLOv8 Biker Helmet Detection System
Final Year Project — a real-time computer vision system detecting helmet usage, rider presence, and vehicle speed using the YOLOv8 object detection algorithm. Generates automated safety enforcement reports. Research paper published in VFAST Transactions on Software Engineering (VTSE). Secured 2nd position at TECHNOVA'25 (IoBM) in the Final Year Project category.
📄 Published Research Paper →
Banking · Dashboard
IO Athena Executive Performance Dashboard
End-to-end HTML/MIS dashboard for UBL's International Operations Athena programme, tracking KPIs across five operational units (CPU Remittance, Account Opening, Trade, PSU/SSU Screening, Treasury Recon) for UAE, Qatar, and Bahrain. Covers Q1 comparative analytics with inline data management and live chart updates.
UBL Internal Project
Process Automation
SWIFT Transaction Workflow Automation
Designed and implemented STP (Straight-Through Processing) workflow documentation and automation for international SWIFT-to-CBS remittance operations, reducing manual intervention and improving processing accuracy for outward and inward remittance flows across three Gulf regions.
UBL Internal Initiative
Google UX
UX Design & Research Projects
Applied Google UX Design methodology across multiple projects as part of the Google UX Design Professional Certificate — covering user research, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing following design thinking principles.
